concerns.text: FR-013 requires validation against KnotInfo reference values but does not include the specific URL endpoint (https://knotinfo.math.indiana.edu/knotinfo/) in the spec text. Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) requires complete references for testable requirements. This is the unresolved concern from prior kickback that must be fixed.

FR-013 mentions validation against KnotInfo but the URL is only referenced in plan.md and research.md, not in the functional requirement text itself. This creates a testability gap where the spec cannot be independently verified without cross-referencing other artifacts.
